name: python3-distributed
title: python3-distributed
description:
Dask Distributed computing for Python 3
Dask.distributed is a lightweight library for distributed computing in
Python. It extends both the concurrent.futures and dask APIs to
moderate sized clusters.
.
This contains the Python 3 version

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for dask-scheduler.
arguments.raw: -scheduler  Option present in package usage line for dask-scheduler.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use dask-scheduler because Dask Distributed computing for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use dask-scheduler as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `dask-scheduler [options] [args]` as documented upstream for dask-scheduler.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair dask-scheduler with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `dask-scheduler --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

arguments.name: -scheduler
